subcodes.first_line: O thou sacrifice at the altar of love! A hundred thousand martyrs shed their blood and freely gave their lives [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ذبیح بقربانگاه عشق صد هزار شهیدان خون ریخته جان رایگان بدادند و عذر قصور
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @martyrs and martyrdom, @Shrines and Holy places, @music and singing
